headline: Bio-Techne Advances Spatial Biology with Modular Expansion of COMET™ Suite
summary: Bio-Techne Corporation (NASDAQ: TECH), a global provider of life science tools, reagents and diagnostic products, today announced the expansion of its COMET™ solution portfolio with the addition of the new SPYRE™ Focus Panels and SPYRE™ Amplification Kits. Together, these strengthen the COMET technology modular, automated spatial biology workflow, delivering expanded flexibility, greater sensitivity, and enabling deeper, more focused interrogation of biologically meaningful data from initial ass
